---
title: "Data Stewardship"
format: html
---
    
    
### What is it?
<!-- <br> -->
*Data stewardship is the actions involved in supporting, promoting, and guiding the use*
*and reuse of data throughout the data lifecycle.*

<br>

::: {.commentbox}
::::{.commentbox-header}
Slides
::::
::::{.commentbox-body}
The [Data Stewardship Lesson]() also includes an exercise to help learners define their "why" for doing data stewardship.  
::::
:::
 
<br>

### Why does data stewardship matter? 
<!-- <br> -->

 * enables faster, better science
 * connects your data to new insights
 * gets you credit for your data work
 * preserves knowledge for the future

<br>

### Defining your "why" for data stewardship
<!-- <br> -->
When thinking about why you might practice data stewardship, consider

 * Who might use your data?
 * What might be the impact of your data?
 * What would make your data or project a success?
 
<br>

### Additional resources

The [Data Stewardship Toolkit]() is a group of worksheets and checklists that guides users through several data stewardship processes and actions. 

EXAMPLE: [Utrecht Bioinformatics Center Zenodo Community](https://zenodo.org/communities/ubc-rdm/) with 4 publications on data stewardship.
